login.heading: Welcome!
login.subtitle: Enter a nickname to get started

error.nicknameMinLength: Enter a nickname with at least 2 characters

blindMode.label: Blind Mode
blindMode.description: Blind Mode — players can only see the last message when writing their part of the story.

twists.label: Twists
twists.description: Twists are unexpected events that can occur mid-game and change the course of the story.

aiComment.title: Story Oracle
aiComment.label: Enable Story Oracle
aiComment.description: The Story Oracle will comment on each story at the end of the game

description.comedian: Finds the humor in every story
description.philosopher: Reflects deeply on the meaning of the story
description.teacher: Explains what was done well and what can be improved

code.hint: Enter the code of the room you want to join

serverStatus.online: Server is up — you can create a game
serverStatus.starting: Server is starting up, please wait...

error.message: An error occurred while checking the server status

rule1.title: One sentence
rule1.description: Each player writes only one phrase per round

rule2.title: Grand Finale
rule2.description: At the end, everyone reads the stories together

lobby.waitingForHost: Waiting for the host to start the game

actions.publishTooltip: This story will be visible to everyone in the public feed

history.remember: Want to revisit the players' stories?

reveal.waitingForHost: Waiting for the host to restart the game

aiComment.loading: The Story Oracle is writing its verdict...
aiComment.title: Story Oracle
aiComment.error: The Story Oracle has fallen silent

error.nicknameMinLength: Enter a nickname with at least 2 characters

errors.NOT_HOST_START: Only the host can start the game
errors.NOT_HOST_EDIT: Only the host can edit the configuration
errors.NOT_HOST_RESTART: Only the host can restart the game
